Bouncy Castle & Inflatable Rentals in Tantallon NS

Nova Kingdom Rentals delivers bouncy castles, combo inflatables, water slides, lawn games, and party packages to Tantallon and the surrounding HRM area. Based in Bridgewater — setup and takedown always included. Tantallon (St. Margarets Bay area) is a scenic coastal community in western HRM, popular for summer backyard events, school celebrations, and community gatherings by the bay.

Nova Kingdom Rentals is based in Bridgewater, Nova Scotia. Approximately 90 km from Bridgewater. Travel quoted. Travel fee applies after the first 15 km from Bridgewater ($0.72/km). Final travel cost confirmed with your quote.

Best For

  • Backyard birthdays
  • School fun days
  • Community events
  • Summer parties

Frequently Asked Questions

Does Nova Kingdom Rentals deliver to Tantallon?
Yes — we deliver to Tantallon and the surrounding HRM area. We are based in Bridgewater (approximately 90 km). Travel is quoted at $0.72/km after the first 15 km. Final cost confirmed with your quote.
Is setup and takedown included?
Yes. Setup and takedown are always included. We handle everything so you can focus on your event.
How far in advance should I book?
Summer weekends and school fun days book quickly — we recommend booking 4–8 weeks ahead. Contact us to check availability.
What happens if it rains?
We monitor weather and communicate with you in advance. Safety is our priority — we'll work with you to find the best solution for borderline weather.
